topic: My front door keeps getting locked from the inside while I am at work
title: My Front Door Keeps Getting Locked from the Inside While I Am at Work | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My front door has been getting locked from the inside while I am at work.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a front door deadbolt thrown from the inside, viewed from the apartment hallway, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Studio apartment. One bedroom. No roommate. No pets.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a small studio apartment with a single front door and a bedroom door visible, no people, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I leave at eight. Come home at six.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand inserting a key into a deadbolt lock, only the hand visible, dim hallway light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First Monday in May. Key would not turn. Bolt was thrown from inside.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a key turning in a deadbolt lock with the bolt visibly held in place from inside, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Called the locksmith. He drilled it.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a locksmith in coveralls drilling into a deadbolt lock seen from behind, no face visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Apartment was empty. Windows locked. Fire escape clear.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of the same apartment with all windows visibly locked and a fire escape window closed, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Installed a doorbell camera. Aimed at the door.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a doorbell camera mounted on the inside of an apartment door frame, dim ambient hallway light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Watched a week of footage. No one came in. No one came out.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a smartphone screen showing seven days of doorbell camera footage thumbnails, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Camera glitched once at three eighteen PM each day. Twelve seconds of black.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a phone screen showing security camera footage with a twelve second black gap visible in the timeline, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Set up a second camera inside. Recorded the bolt. Twelve seconds of black. Bolt turned.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a second security camera footage showing a deadbolt turning by itself in a darkened apartment, no figures visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have been letting myself in through the fire escape. Three weeks.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an apartment fire escape window seen from inside, the latch in the unlocked position, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Yesterday the fire escape window was locked too. From inside.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a fire escape window latch in the locked position from inside, the alley visible beyond the glass, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
